heading: Statement of purpose
label: 6101 Statement of purpose
text: It is the purpose of this chapter to prohibit discrimination on the basis of age in programs or activities receiving Federal financial assistance.
notes: Amendments1986— struck out “, including programs or activities receiving funds under the State and Local Fiscal Assistance Act of 1972 ( et seq.)” after “Federal financial assistance”.Pub. L. 99–27231 U.S.C. 12211978— struck out “unreasonable” before “discrimination”.Pub. L. 95–478

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–135, title III, § 30189 Stat. 728Nov. 28, 1975“The provisions of this title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Age Discrimination Act of 1975’.”
